summary: Believability-hardening backfill — 4 demo-data realism fixes from live feedback after M226, all in the rext seed/content tooling, 0 platform-repo edits. Fix #1 hiring-only content (generic activity seeders skip a hiring org) · #2 external candidate emails (role-keyed, roster==users==login) · #3 1 sim per candidate (~8/position) + compare gate retuned >=40 -> >=6 EVERYWHERE (5+45 fence + mirror-pair preserved) · #4 gender-consistent avatars (all orgs). All 4 proven DETERMINISTICALLY by the unit+regression suite; the LOCAL live-render re-prove was environment-blocked -> Fate 2 -> M228 second-night (already planned; M228 exit gate covers the corrected-data live render).

sections.S1: Hiring-only content (#M227-D1): 6 generic activity seeders (persona/activity/jobsim/skillpath/assignments/hero-activity) skip a hiring org via the shared hiring_scope.go IsHiringOrg() guard -> the hiring org's whole sim footprint is HiringFunnel HIRING sims; regression test proves ZERO generic-activity rows for a hiring org, workforce orgs unchanged (rext 8ed8791)
sections.S2: External candidate emails (#M227-D2): email domain keyed on ROLE via single-sourced emailForMember (candidate -> external bank gmail/outlook/proton/...; else org domain); roster.go + users.go single-source so login == public.users.email == Clerkenstein roster; Cara/Cody heroes -> external + manifest regenerated (honesty gate green) (rext 9aa024b)
sections.S3: 1 sim per candidate + gate retune (#M227-D3): HiringFunnelSeeder round-robins each assessed candidate onto exactly 1 position (43 assessed -> min 8 / max 9 per position) keeping the M219 mirror pair; compare gate retuned >=40 -> floor 6 (margin 2) EVERYWHERE: hiringComparableFloor, RENDER_GATE_FLOOR, run-hiring-render.sh, playthrough note, M224 GATE-DECISION D1, M226/M228 exit gates, hiring.md/seeding-spec/stories-spec, roadmap (rext 877b091 + rosetta docs)
sections.S4: Gender-consistent avatars (#M227-D4): assets gender partition (F={0,2,4,6,9} M={1,3,5,7,8,10,11}) + build-time fence; photoAvatarDataURIForName(seed, firstName) + curated inferGender dictionary; threaded at all 3 avatar call sites (users.go/generated_batch.go/roster.go); Unknown-name fallback byte-identical to the old full-pool pick (rext 63c3e8d)
sections.S5: Local re-prove: rext tagged (casting-call-m227-sections); DATA correctness of all 4 fixes proven DETERMINISTICALLY by the unit+regression suite; the LIVE full-stack render/coverage/playthrough re-prove was BLOCKED by the local Docker environment (ENOSPC + evicted build cache + buildx contention) -> routed to M228 (Fate 2, already planned)

notes: The believability-hardening section milestone (4 live-feedback fixes + a gate retune). All 4 fixes DETERMINISTICALLY PROVEN by the unit+regression suite (stronger than ad-hoc SQL) + write-path-fenced by harden. The one close finding was documentation: 3 of the 4 fix mechanisms (hiring-only, external emails, gender avatars) were undocumented in the corpus (fix #3 gate retune was already in) -> blended at Phase 5 with #M227-D refs. Section 5's LIVE render re-prove was environment-blocked (local Docker box wedged; now recovering) -> Fate 2 -> M228 (the billion re-prove, already planned; its exit gate covers the corrected-data render). Close operated on deterministic suites only (go/tsc) per the environment constraint: go vet clean + 13 pkgs green + flake 5/5 + tsc exit 0 = the close-time signal. Zero platform-repo edits; the pre-existing unrelated working-tree changes (.gitignore + _email-assets) never staged. Not the final v2.4 milestone (M228 second-night remains) -> release-branch merge only, NO main-merge, NO v2.4 tag, NO close-release.
